file_name: Australian Venue Co - An Sibin Irish Pub - Questionnaire - 24 February 2026_0.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if any AVC licensed venues are close competitors with An Sibin Irish Pub and there are few alternatives.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with AVC and/or An Sibin Irish Pub.
